functions.functionContentWithoutFormatting: { ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to FREE/SOFT bit // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL1) = ((HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL1) & (~ECAP_ECCTL1_FREE_SOFT_M)) | ((uint16_t)mode << ECAP_ECCTL1_FREE_SOFT_S)); }
{ return( (base == ECAP1_BASE) || (base == ECAP2_BASE) || (base == ECAP3_BASE) || (base == ECAP4_BASE) || (base == ECAP5_BASE) || (base == ECAP6_BASE) ); }

{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(preScalerValue < ECAP_MAX_PRESCALER_VALUE); // // Write to PRESCALE bit // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL1) = ((HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL1) & (~ECAP_ECCTL1_PRESCALE_M)) | (preScalerValue << ECAP_ECCTL1_PRESCALE_S)); }

{ uint16_t shift; ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); shift = ((uint16_t)event) << 1U; // // Write to CAP1POL, CAP2POL, CAP3POL or CAP4POL // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL1) = (HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL1) & ~(1U << shift)) | ((uint16_t)polarity << shift); }

{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to CONT/ONESHT // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) = ((HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) & (~ECAP_ECCTL2_CONT_ONESHT)) | (uint16_t)mode); // // Write to STOP_WRAP // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) = ((HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) & (~ECAP_ECCTL2_STOP_WRAP_M)) | (((uint16_t)event) << ECAP_ECCTL2_STOP_WRAP_S )); }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to RE-ARM bit // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) |= ECAP_ECCTL2_REARM; }

{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((intFlags & ~(ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_1 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_2 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_3 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_4 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_COUNTER_OVERFLOW | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_COUNTER_PERIOD | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_COUNTER_COMPARE)) == 0U); // // Set bits in ECEINT register // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECEINT) |= intFlags; }

{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((intFlags & ~(ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_1 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_2 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_3 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_4 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_COUNTER_OVERFLOW | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_COUNTER_PERIOD | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_COUNTER_COMPARE)) == 0U); // // Clear bits in ECEINT register // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECEINT) &= ~intFlags; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Return contents of ECFLG register // return(HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECFLG) & 0xFEU); }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Return contents of Global interrupt bit // return((HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECFLG) & 0x1U) == 0x1U); }

{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((intFlags & ~(ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_1 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_2 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_3 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_4 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_COUNTER_OVERFLOW | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_COUNTER_PERIOD | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_COUNTER_COMPARE)) == 0U); // // Write to ECCLR register // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCLR) = intFlags; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to INT bit // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCLR) = ECAP_ECCLR_INT; }

{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((intFlags & ~(ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_1 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_2 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_3 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_CAPTURE_EVENT_4 | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_COUNTER_OVERFLOW | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_COUNTER_PERIOD | ECAP_ISR_SOURCE_COUNTER_COMPARE)) == 0U); // // Write to ECFRC register // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECFRC) = intFlags; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear CAP/APWM bit // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) &= ~ECAP_ECCTL2_CAP_APWM; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set CAP/APWM bit // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) |= ECAP_ECCTL2_CAP_APWM; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set CTRRST1,CTRRST2,CTRRST3 or CTRRST4 bits // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL1) |= 1U << ((2U * (uint16_t)event) + 1U); }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear CTRRST1,CTRRST2,CTRRST3 or CTRRST4 bits // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL1) &= ~(1U << ((2U * (uint16_t)event) + 1U)); }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set CAPLDEN bit // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL1) |= ECAP_ECCTL1_CAPLDEN; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear CAPLDEN bit // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL1) &= ~ECAP_ECCTL1_CAPLDEN; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to CTRPHS // HWREG(base + ECAP_O_CTRPHS) = shiftCount; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to SYNCI_EN // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) |= ECAP_ECCTL2_SYNCI_EN; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to SYNCI_EN // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) &= ~ECAP_ECCTL2_SYNCI_EN; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to SWSYNC // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) |= ECAP_ECCTL2_SWSYNC; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to SYNCO_SEL // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) = ((HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) & (~ECAP_ECCTL2_SYNCO_SEL_M)) | (uint16_t)mode); }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear TSCTR // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) &= ~ECAP_ECCTL2_TSCTRSTOP; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set TSCTR // HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) |= ECAP_ECCTL2_TSCTRSTOP; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) = ((HWREGH(base + ECAP_O_ECCTL2) & ~ECAP_ECCTL2_APWMPOL) | (uint16_t)polarity); }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to CAP1 // HWREG(base + ECAP_O_CAP1) = periodCount; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to CAP2 // HWREG(base + ECAP_O_CAP2) = compareCount; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to CAP3 // HWREG(base + ECAP_O_CAP3) = periodCount; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to CAP4 // HWREG(base + ECAP_O_CAP4) = compareCount; }
{ ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); // // Read the Time base counter value // return(HWREG(base + ECAP_O_TSCTR)); }

{ uint32_t count; ASSERT(ECAP_isBaseValid(base)); switch(event) { case ECAP_EVENT_1: // // Read CAP1 register // count = HWREG(base + ECAP_O_CAP1); break; case ECAP_EVENT_2: // // Read CAP2 register // count = HWREG(base + ECAP_O_CAP2); break; case ECAP_EVENT_3: // // Read CAP3 register // count = HWREG(base + ECAP_O_CAP3); break; case ECAP_EVENT_4: // // Read CAP4 register // count = HWREG(base + ECAP_O_CAP4); break; default: // // Invalid event parameter // count = 0U; break; } return(count); }
